From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
Administrative entry restrictions

Visa requirements for Uruguayan citizens are administrative entry restrictions by the authorities of other states placed on citizens of Uruguay.

As of 2025, Uruguayan citizens had visa-free or visa on arrival access to 156 countries and territories, ranking the Uruguayan passport 23rd in the world according to the Henley Passport Index.[1]

For traveling within South America (except the Guyanas and European dependencies), Uruguayans do not need to use a passport, as they may use their ID card.

Visa requirements map

[edit]

Visa requirements

[edit]

Visa requirements for holders of normal passports traveling for tourist purposes:

Uruguay is a full member of Mercosur. As such, its citizens enjoy unlimited access to any of the other full members (Argentina, Brazil and Paraguay) and associated members (Bolivia, Chile, Colombia, Ecuador and Peru) with the right to residence and work, with no requirement other than nationality.

Citizens of these 9 countries (including Uruguay) may apply for the grant of "temporary residence" for up to 2 years in another country of the bloc.[2] Then, they may apply for "permanent residence" just before the term of their "temporary residence" expires.[3][4]

Country Visa requirement Allowed stay Notes (excluding departure fees)
Afghanistan Visa required[5]
  • Visitors born in Afghanistan do not require a visa.
  • All visitors are fingerprinted, and are required to register with the Ministry of Foreign Affairs upon arrival.
  • The Taliban accepts visas issued by diplomatic missions not under its control.[6]
Albania Visa not required[7] 90 days
Algeria Visa required[8]
  • Application for a tourist visa to Algeria must be accompanied either by a certificate of accommodation.
  • Persons may be denied entry if entering with a passport containing visas or stamps issued by Israel.
Andorra Visa not required[9]
Angola Visa not required[10] 30 days Maximum 3 entries in calendar year
Antigua and Barbuda eVisa[11]
Argentina Visa not required[12] 3 months
  • Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old.
  • Uruguayans can live and work legally in Argentina under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check.
  • Visitors are fingerprinted (Right thumb fingerprint) and photographed upon entry.[13]
  • Uruguayans may request lawful permanent resident status in Argentina at any time.[14]
Armenia Visa not required[15] 3 months
Australia and territories Online Visa required[16][17]
  • May apply online (Online Visitor e600 visa).
Austria Visa not required[18] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
  • Residence permit (Aufenthaltstitel) for stays of longer than 90 days obtainable after arrival under certain conditions.
Azerbaijan Visa required[19]
Bahamas Visa not required[20] 3 months
Bahrain eVisa / Visa on arrival[21] 14 days
  • Visa also obtainable online.
Bangladesh Visa on arrival[22] 30 days
  • Available at Dhaka, Chittagong, and Sylhet international airports.
Barbados Visa not required[23] 90 days
Belarus Visa not required[24] 30 days
  • Must arrive and depart via Minsk International Airport.
Belgium Visa not required[25] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Belize Visa not required[26] 90 days
Benin eVisa[27] 30 days
  • International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.[28]
  • e-Visas are available for 30 or 90 days.
Bhutan eVisa[29]
  • Sustainable Development Fee of 200 USD per day for almost all visitors to Bhutan.[30]
  • Holders of an application for a tourist visa can obtain a visa on arrival.
Bolivia Visa not required[31] 90 days
  • Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old.
  • Uruguayans can live and work legally in Bolivia under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check.
Bosnia and Herzegovina Visa not required[32] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 6-month period.
  • Registration with the local police within 24 hours of arrival is mandatory.[33]
Botswana Visa not required[34] 90 days
  • 90 days within any year period.
Brazil Visa not required[35] 90 days
  • Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old.
  • Uruguayans can live and work legally in Brazil under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check.
  • Uruguayans may request lawful permanent resident status in Brazil at any time.[36]
Brunei Visa required[37]
Bulgaria Visa not required[38] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Burkina Faso eVisa[39]
  • International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.[40]
Burundi Visa on arrival[41] 1 month
  • Visa on arrival obtainable at Bujumbura International Airport, and all land borders.[42]
Cambodia eVisa / Visa on arrival[43][44] 30 days
  • Visa is also obtainable online.
  • All visitors are fingerprinted upon arrival and departure.[45]
Cameroon eVisa[46][47]
  • International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis and current immunization records required.[48]
Canada Visa required[49]
Cape Verde Visa on arrival[50]
  • Not available at all entry points.[51]
Central African Republic Visa required[52]
Chad Visa required[53]
Chile Visa not required[54] 90 days
  • Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old.
  • Uruguayans can live and work legally in Chile under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check.
China Visa not required[55] 30 days
  • Visa-free from June 1, 2025 until December 31, 2026.[56]
  • Visa free for Hong Kong and Macao for 90 days.
Colombia Visa not required[57] 90 days
  • 90 days – extendable up to 180-days stay within a one-year period.
  • Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old.
  • Uruguayans can live and work legally in Colombia under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check.
Comoros Visa on arrival[58] 45 days
Republic of the Congo Visa required[59]
  • Visa not required for passengers with a V.I.P invitation letter.
  • International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.
  • A letter of invitation or written proof of a hotel reservation is required.
Democratic Republic of the Congo eVisa[60][61] 7 days
  • Passenger with a letter (Visa Volant) issued by the Ministry of Interior and Security can obtain a visa on arrival.
  • International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.
  • Registration required.
Costa Rica Visa not required[62] 90 days
Côte d'Ivoire eVisa[63][64] 3 months
  • e-Visa holders must arrive via Port Bouet Airport.
Croatia Visa not required[65] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Cuba Tourist card required / eVisa[66] 90 days
  • Can be extended up to 90 days with a fee.
Cyprus Visa not required[67] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
Czech Republic Visa not required[68] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Denmark Visa not required[69] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Djibouti eVisa[70] 90 days
Dominica Visa not required[71] 90 days
Dominican Republic Visa not required[72] 30 days
  • Can be extended up to 120 days
Ecuador Visa not required[73] 90 days[74]
  • Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old.
  • Uruguayans can live and work legally in Ecuador under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check.
Egypt Visa on arrival[75] 30 days
  • e-Visa issued for 30 days.
  • Visa-free travel for tourists arriving at Sharm El Sheikh, St. Catherine, or Taba airports and remaining in the Sinai resorts up to 15 days.[76]
El Salvador Visa not required[77] 180 days
Equatorial Guinea eVisa[78]
Eritrea Visa required[79]
  • Permit required to leave capital.
Estonia Visa not required[80] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Eswatini Visa not required[81] 30 days[74]
Ethiopia eVisa[82][83] up to 90 days
  • e-Visa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.
Fiji Visa not required[84] 4 months
Finland Visa not required[85] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
France and territories Visa not required[86] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Gabon eVisa[87] 90 days
  • e-Visas are available for one to six months.
  • Electronic visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport.
  • International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.[88]
Gambia Visa required[89]
Georgia Visa not required[90] 90 days
Germany Visa not required[91] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Ghana Visa required[92]
  • International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.[93]
  • Multiple entry visa valid for 1 year from date of issue upon arrival into Ghana is mandatory.
Greece Visa not required[94] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Grenada Visa not required[95] 3 months
Guatemala Visa not required[96] 90 days
Guinea eVisa[97] 90 days
  • International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.[98]
Guinea-Bissau Visa on arrival[99] 90 days
Guyana Visa not required[100] 90 days
Haiti Visa not required[101] 3 months
Honduras Visa not required[102] 90 days
Hungary Visa not required[103] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Iceland Visa not required[104] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
India eVisa[105] 30 days
  • e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports[Note 1] or 5 designated seaports.[Note 2][106]
  • An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.[107]
  • Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa.[108]
Indonesia Visa required[109]
Iran eVisa[110][111] 30 days
Iraq eVisa[112][113]
Ireland Visa not required[114] 90 days
Israel ETA-IL[115] 90 days
Italy Visa not required[116] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Jamaica Visa not required[117] 30 days
Japan Visa not required[118] 90 days
Jordan eVisa / Visa on arrival[119][120] 30 days
  • Visa can be obtained upon arrival, it will cost a total of 40 JOD, obtainable at most international ports of entry and land border crossings. (except King Hussein/Allenby Bridge)
  • Not available at King Hussein/Allenby Bridge[121]
Kazakhstan eVisa[122]
  • Visitors arriving from a country without Kazakh representation and holding an invitation letter, can obtain a single entry visa on arrival for a max. stay of 1 month.
Kenya Electronic Travel Authorisation[123][124] 90 days
  • Applications can be submitted up to 90 days prior to travel and must be submitted at least 3 days in advance.
  • eTA fee is USD 32.50.
  • Proof of reservation at the hotel where visitors plan to stay is required (if staying with friends, an invitation letter is also acceptable).
  • Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.
Kiribati Visa not required[125] 90 days
  • May not exceed 90 days within any 12 months period.
North Korea Visa required[126]
South Korea Electronic Travel Authorization[127] 90 days
  • All visitors are fingerprinted. From September 2021, travelers require the Korean Electronic Travel Authorization (K-ETA). The validity period is 3 years from the date of approval.[128][129]
Kuwait Visa required[130]
Kyrgyzstan eVisa[131] 60 days
  • e-Visa holders must arrive via Manas International Airport or Osh Airport or through land crossings with China (at Irkeshtam and Torugart), Kazakhstan (at Ak-jol, Ak-Tilek, Chaldybar, Chon-Kapka), Tajikistan (at Bor-Dobo, Kulundu, Kyzyl-Bel) and Uzbekistan (at Dostuk).
Laos eVisa / Visa on arrival[132] 30 days
  • 18[Note 3] of the 33 border crossings are only open to regular visa holders.[133]
  • e-Visa may be used to enter Laos through the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 3 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges[Note 4], in Boten (road and railroad), and in Vientiane (at Khamsavath railway station).[133]
  • Visa on arrival is available at the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 4 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges[Note 5] and 7 border crossings.[Note 6][133]
Latvia Visa not required[134] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Lebanon Free visa on arrival[135] 30 days
  • Visa waiver granted if there is no Israeli visa or seal and traveler has a telephone number, an address in Lebanon, and a non refundable return or circle trip ticket.
Lesotho eVisa[136][137] 44 days
Liberia Visa required[138]
Libya eVisa[139] 30 days
Liechtenstein Visa not required[140] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Lithuania Visa not required[141] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Luxembourg Visa not required[142] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Madagascar Visa on arrival[143] 60 days
Malawi eVisa / Visa on arrival[144][145] 90 days
Malaysia Visa not required[146] 90 days
  • All visitors are fingerprinted on arrival and departure.[147]
  • Immigration offenses, such as visa overstaying, are punishable by caning.
Maldives Free visa on arrival[148] 30 days
Mali Visa required[149]
Malta Visa not required[150] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Marshall Islands Visa on arrival[151] 90 days
  • International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.[152]
Mauritania Visa on arrival[153]
  • Available at Nouakchott–Oumtounsy International Airport.
Mauritius Visa on arrival[154] 60 days
Mexico Visa not required[155] 180 days
Micronesia Visa not required[156] 30 days
Moldova Visa not required[157] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180-day period.
Monaco Visa not required[158]
Mongolia Visa not required[159] 30 days
Montenegro Visa not required[160] 90 days
  • Registration with the local police within 24 hours of arrival is mandatory.[161]
Morocco Visa required[162]
Mozambique eVisa / Visa on arrival[163] 30 days
  • Travelers must register on the e-Visa platform at least 48 hours prior to travel and pay a processing fee of 650 MT.
Myanmar eVisa[164] 28 days
  • e-Visa holders must arrive via Yangon, Nay Pyi Taw or Mandalay airports or via land border crossings with Thailand — Tachileik, Myawaddy and Kawthaung or India — Rih Khaw Dar and Tamu.
  • e-Visa is available for tourism only.
Namibia Visa on arrival[165] 3 months
  • Available at Hosea Kutako International Airport, Kalahari Border Crossing and Walvis Bay Airport.
Nauru Visa required[166]
  Nepal Online Visa / Visa on arrival[167] 90 days
  • Obtainable at Tribhuvan International Airport and certain land borders.
  • Total aggregate stay of no more than 150 days in any given calendar year.[168]
Netherlands Visa not required[169] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority[170] 3 months
  • International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy must be paid upon requesting an Electronic Travel Authority.[171]
  • Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure.[172] Such travellers are not required to pay the International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy.[171]
Nicaragua Visa not required[173] 90 days
  • Tourist card must be purchased upon arrival.[174]
Niger Visa required[175]
Nigeria eVisa[176][177] 90 days
  • Holders of written e-Visa approval issued by Immigration Authority can obtain a visa on arrival, provided holding a visa application form and e-Visa application payment receipt and holding an invitation letter from Nigerian company accepting immigration responsibilities.
  • International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required if arriving from a country with a risk of yellow fever transmission.
North Macedonia Visa not required[178] 90 days
  • Registration with the local police within 24 hours of arrival is mandatory.[179]
Norway Visa not required[180] 90 days
  • 3 months within a 6-month period, regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries, but including time spent in other Nordic countries.[181][182]
Oman Visa not required / eVisa[183] 14 days / 30 days
  • Holders of a visa or entrance stamp of the Emirate of Dubai that is valid for at least 21 days are visa exempt.
  • Holders of a visa for Qatar that is valid for travel to Oman and valid for at least one month are visa exempt when arriving directly from Qatar.
Pakistan Online Visa[184] 90 days
  • Free of charge
Palau Free visa on arrival[185] 30 days
Panama Visa not required[186] 90 days
  • Denial of entry or transit to any person who has a criminal conviction.[187]
Papua New Guinea Easy Visitor Permit[188] 60 days
  • Available at Gurney Airport (Alotau), Mount Hagen Airport, Port Moresby Airport and Tokua Airport (Rabaul).
Paraguay Visa not required[189] 90 days
  • Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old.
  • Uruguayans can live and work legally in Paraguay under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check.
Peru Visa not required[190] 90 days
  • Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old.
  • Uruguayans can live and work legally in Peru under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check.
Philippines Visa not required[191] 30 days
Poland Visa not required[192] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Portugal Visa not required[193] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Qatar Visa not required[194] 30 days
Romania Visa not required[195] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Russia Visa not required[196] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
Rwanda eVisa / Visa on arrival[197] 30 days
  • Visitors are fingerprinted
  • International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.
Saint Kitts and Nevis Visa not required[198] 3 months
Saint Lucia Visa not required[199] 6 weeks
Saint Vincent and the Grenadines Visa not required[200] 3 month
Samoa Visa not required[201] 60 days
San Marino Visa not required[202]
São Tomé and Príncipe eVisa[203][204]
  • International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.[205]
Saudi Arabia Visa required[206]
Senegal Visa required[207]
  • Visa not required for passengers with an official invitation letter.
  • International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.[208]
Serbia Visa not required[209] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 6-month period.
Seychelles Electronic Border System[210] 3 months
  • Application can be submitted up to 30 days before travel.
  • Visitors must upload a reservation confirmation(s) for each visitor's location of stay in Seychelles.
  • Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.
  • Payment of the fee (EUR 10) by credit or debit card.
  • Valid for one journey only and it expires once exit the country.
Sierra Leone eVisa[211] 3 months[212]
  • International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.[213]
Singapore Visa not required[214] 30 days
  • All visitors are fingerprinted upon arrival and departure[215]
Slovakia Visa not required[216] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Slovenia Visa not required[217] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Solomon Islands Visa required[218]
Somalia Visa on arrival[219] 30 days
  • Available at Bosaso Airport, Galcaio Airport and Mogadishu Airport.
South Africa Visa not required[220] 90 days
  • Holders of passports without 2 blank pages may be refused entry.
South Sudan eVisa[221]
  • Obtainable online.
  • Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel.
Spain Visa not required[222] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Sri Lanka eVisa / Visa on arrival[223][224] 60 days / 30 days
  • The standard visitor visa allows a stay of 60 days within any 6-month period.[225]
  • Visa fees (for Standard visitor visa):
    • SAARC - USD 35
    • Non SAARC - USD 75
  • e-Visa categories will be charged an additional USD 18.50 service fee.
  • If transiting from any of the Sri Lankan airports, An e-Visa is exempted (2 day transit period).
Sudan Visa required[226]
Suriname Visa not required[227][228] 90 days
  • An entrance fee of USD 50 or EUR 50 must be paid online prior to arrival.[229]
  • Multiple entry e-Visa is also available.[230]
Sweden Visa not required[231] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
 Switzerland Visa not required[232] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.
Syria Visa required[233][234] 15 days
  • Visa not required for foreign citizens with proof of Syrian origin, such as an identification card or passport.
  • Dual-citizen males ages 17–42 need military service book.
Tajikistan eVisa[235] 60 days
Tanzania eVisa / Visa on arrival[236][237] 90 days
Thailand Visa not required[238] 60 days
Timor-Leste Visa on arrival[239] 30 days
  • Not available at all entry points.[240]
Togo eVisa[241][242] 15 days
Tonga Visa required[243]
Trinidad and Tobago Visa not required[244] 90 days
Tunisia Visa required[245]
Turkey Visa not required[246] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180-day period.[247]
Turkmenistan Visa required[248]
Tuvalu Visa on arrival[249] 1 month[74]
Uganda eVisa[250] 3 months
  • Determined at the port of entry.
  • Must apply online at least 2 business days prior to travel.
  • Airlines may deny passengers permission to board flights to Uganda without proof that they had successfully applied for an e-Visa.
  • Ugandan immigration authorities may require additional documentation, including proof of a return plane ticket and detailed tour itinerary in Uganda.
  • International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.[251]
Ukraine Visa not required[252] 90 days
  • 90 days within any 180 day period.
United Arab Emirates Visa not required[253] 90 days
  • Extension possible with a fee.
  • Iris scan taken on arrival.
United Kingdom Electronic Travel Authorisation[254] 6 months
  • ETA required.
  • Up to 90 days if arriving from Ireland (Common Travel Area).
United States Visa required[255]
Uzbekistan eVisa[256] 30 days
  • 5-day visa-free transit at the international airports if holding a confirmed onward ticket for a flight to a third country.[257]
Vanuatu Visa not required[258] 30 days
Vatican City Visa not required[259]
  • Open borders but de facto follows Italian visa policy.
  • No foreign accommodations, residency restricted to Vatican citizens only.[260]
Venezuela Visa not required[261] 90 days
  • Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old.
Vietnam eVisa[262] 90 days
  • Phú Quốc visa exemption for up to 30 days.[263]
Yemen Visa required[264]
  • Registration mandatory.
  • Exit visa required for stays over 30 days.[265]
Zambia eVisa / Visa on arrival[266][267] 90 days
  • Also eligible for a universal visa allowing access to Zimbabwe.
  • All visitors are fingerprinted.
  • Two blank pages required.
  • International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.
Zimbabwe Visa on arrival[268] 30 days
  • Also eligible for a universal visa allowing access to Zambia.
  • Tourism purposes only.[269]

Territories and disputed areas

[edit]

Visa requirements for Uruguayan citizens for visits to various territories, disputed areas and restricted zones:

Visitor to Visa requirement Notes (excluding departure fees)
Abkhazia Visa required[270]
Isla Apipé and Isla del medio Visa not required
  • By being Argentine territories, the same visa policy applies.
Kosovo Visa not required 90 days[271]
Northern Cyprus Visa not required[272]
Mayotte Visa not required[273] 90 days
Palestine Visa not required[274] Arrival by sea to Gaza Strip not allowed.[275]
Sahrawi Arab Democratic Republic Unclear Undefined visa regime in the Western Sahara controlled territory.
Réunion Visa not required[276] 90 days
Somaliland Visa on arrival 30 days for 30 USD, payable on arrival.[277][278]
Sudan outside Khartoum Travel permit required
  • All foreigners traveling more than 25 kilometers outside of Khartoum must obtain a travel permit.
Darfur Travel permit required
  • Separate travel permit is required.[279]
British Indian Ocean Territory Special permit required
  • Special permit required.[280]
Hong Kong Visa not required 90 days[281]
Protected and restricted areas of India PAP/RAP required
  • Protected Area Permit (PAP) required for whole states of Nagaland and Sikkim and parts of states Manipur, Arunachal Pradesh, Uttaranchal, Jammu and Kashmir, Rajasthan, Himachal Pradesh.
  • Restricted Area Permit (RAP) required for all of Andaman and Nicobar Islands and parts of Sikkim.
  • Some of these requirements are occasionally lifted for a year.[282][283][284][285][286][287]
Iraqi Kurdistan eVisa[288] 30 days
Baikonur & Priozersk Special permission required
  • Special permission required for the city of Baikonur and surrounding areas in Kyzylorda Oblast, and the town of Priozersk near Almaty.[289]
Kish Island Visa not required
  • Tourists for Kish Island do not require a visa.[290]
Macau Visa not required 90 days[291]
Sabah and Sarawak Visa not required
Maldives outside Malé Permission required
  • Tourists are generally prohibited from visiting non-resort islands without the express permission of the Government of the Maldives.[292]
Gorno-Badakhshan Autonomous Province OIVR permit required
  • OIVR permit required.
  • Special permit required for Lake Sarez.[293][294][295]
Tibet Autonomous Region TTP required
  • Tibet Travel Permit required in addition to Chinese visa.[296]
Mecca and Medina Special access required
Taiwan Visa required[297][298]
Closed cities of Turkmenistan Special permit required
  • A special permit, issued prior to arrival by Ministry of Foreign Affairs, is required if visiting the following places: Atamurat, Cheleken, Dashoguz, Serakhs and Serhetabat.[299]
Phú Quốc Visa not required 30 days[300]
Yemen outside Sanaa or Aden Special permission required
Åland Islands Visa not required[301] 3 months
Anguilla Visa not required 3 months[302]
Aruba Visa not required[303][304] 30 days
Bermuda Visa not required[305] 6 months
(Bonaire, St. Eustatius and Saba) Visa not required 180 days
British Virgin Islands Visa not required 30 days
Cayman Islands Visa not required 6 months[306]
San Andrés and Leticia Tourist Card on arrival
Curaçao Visa not required 6 months
French West Indies (Martinique, Guadeloupe, Saint Martin and Saint Barthélemy) Visa not required 3 months
Greenland Visa not required[307]
Montserrat Visa not required 6 months
Puerto Rico Visa required
Sint Maarten Visa not required 6 months
Turks and Caicos Islands Visa not required 90 days[308]
U.S. Virgin Islands Visa required
Brest and Grodno Visa not required
[may be outdated as of February 2022] 		10 days[309]
Crimea Visa not required
[may be outdated as of February 2022]
Novorossiya Restricted area
[may be outdated as of February 2022]
  • Crossing from Ukraine requires visit purpose to be explained to Ukrainian passport control on exit and those who entered from Russia are not allowed to proceed further into Ukraine.[310]
Faroe Islands Visa not required[307]
Gibraltar Visa not required[311]
Guernsey Visa not required[312]
Isle of Man Visa not required[313]
Jan Mayen Permit required[311] 24 hours
Jersey Visa not required[314]
Closed cities of Russia Special authorization required
  • Several closed cities and regions in Russia require special authorization.[citation needed]
South Ossetia Visa not required
  • Multiple entry visa to Russia and three-day prior notification are required to enter South Ossetia.[315][316]
Svalbard Visa not required[317] Unlimited
Transnistria Visa not required 24 hours
American Samoa visa required
Ashmore and Cartier Islands Special authorisation required
Clipperton Island Special permit required
Cook Islands Visa not required 31 days[318]
Lau Province Special permission required
French Polynesia Visa not required 90 days
Guam Visa required
Niue Visa not required 30 days[319]
New Caledonia Visa not required 90 days
Northern Mariana Islands Visa required
Pitcairn Islands Visa not required[320] 14 days
Tokelau Entry permit required[321]
Galápagos Pre-registration required
French Guiana Visa not required 3 months[322]
Falkland Islands Visa not required[323] 1 month
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands Permit required
Antarctica Special permits required

Pre-approved visas pick-up

[edit]

Pre-approved visas can be picked up on arrival in the following countries instead in embassy or consulate.

Pre-approved
visas pick-up
on arrival		 Conditions
Bhutan[324] For a maximum stay of 15 days if the application was submitted at least 2 and a half months before arrival and if the clearance was obtained.
Cameroon[325] Must hold approval from the General Delegate of Security.
Eritrea[326] Must have a sponsor who must submit an application at least 48 hours before arrival.
Liberia[327] Available only if arriving from a country without a diplomatic mission of Liberia and if a sponsor obtained an approval.
Nigeria[328] Holders of a visa application who have a Nigerian company taking responsibility for them.
Sudan[329] Holders of an entry permit issued by the Ministry of Interior.
Turkmenistan[330] Holders of an invitation letter of the local company that was approved by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs.

See also

[edit]
  • Uruguay portal
  • Visa policy of Uruguay
  • Uruguayan passport

1 British Overseas Territories. 2 Azerbaijan, Georgia, Turkey, Kazakhstan, Russia and the partially recognised republics of Abkhazia and South Ossetia each span the conventional boundary between Europe and Asia. 3 Cyprus, Armenia, and the partially recognised republic of Northern Cyprus are entirely in Western Asia but have socio-political connections with Europe. 4 Egypt spans the boundary between Africa and Asia. 5 Partially recognized.
